seoTitle: Customize Your Marketing Audit Report in GoHighLevel
metaDescription: Learn how to customize the marketing audit report in GoHighLevel so it fits your business or agency's reporting needs.
intro: A generic audit report doesn't always highlight what matters most to your clients or business. This tutorial covers customizing the marketing audit report feature in GoHighLevel, so your reports are clear, relevant, and presentation-ready.

steps.heading: Access the audit report feature
steps.body: Navigate to the marketing audit report tool within GoHighLevel to begin customizing your report.

steps.heading: Review customization options
steps.body: Explore the available sections and elements you can adjust to fit your reporting needs.

steps.heading: Integrate your data
steps.body: Pull relevant data into the report so it reflects accurate insights about the business being audited.

steps.heading: Present your results effectively
steps.body: Apply formatting and presentation best practices so the final report is clear and easy for clients to understand.

faq.question: Is the marketing audit report feature useful for agencies specifically?
faq.answer: Yes, it's particularly useful for agencies presenting findings and recommendations to clients.

faq.question: Can I save a customized report template for future audits?
faq.answer: Yes, once you've customized a report layout, you can reuse the same structure for future audits.

faq.question: Does the report pull data automatically or require manual entry?
faq.answer: It can integrate with other GoHighLevel data sources, reducing the need for fully manual entry.

faq.question: Can I export the audit report to share outside of GoHighLevel?
faq.answer: Yes, audit reports are generally exportable or shareable so they can be sent directly to clients.
